title: selaginella burkei
intro: Selaginella burkei, also known as the spikemoss or resurrection fern, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Selaginella burkei include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and acting as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Selaginella burkei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
